description_long: This object is a plush stuffed toy modeled after a giant panda, featuring a rounded body with a soft, fabric exterior. The toy is predominantly white with distinct black patches on its legs, shoulders, and around its eyes, mimicking the natural coloration of a real panda. Its head is large and slightly lowered, with small, rounded ears and a gentle, neutral facial expression. The limbs are thick and slightly bent, giving the toy a sturdy, huggable appearance. The surface appears matte and soft, with subtle fabric creases and a slightly fuzzy texture. There are no visible accessories, clothing, or branding on the toy.
description: A soft, plush stuffed toy resembling a giant panda, with black and white coloration and a gentle, neutral face.
description_view_0: The front and right side of the panda are visible, showing the facial features, rounded ears, and the black patch around the right eye.
description_view_1: The head is viewed from the front-left, highlighting the symmetry of the face and the black patches around both eyes.
description_view_2: The left side and back of the panda are visible, emphasizing the black patch on the left shoulder and the curve of the back.
description_view_3: The rear and left side of the panda are shown, with the back and both hind legs clearly visible.
attribute_facial_expression: The facial expression is neutral, with closed or slightly indented eyes and a relaxed mouth, giving a calm and gentle appearance.
attribute_pose_or_posture: Standing on all four limbs with the head slightly lowered and the body in a natural, relaxed stance.
